Chapter 10 remains aligned to the continuity sheet's canonical voicemail timestamp of 8:47 PM. The remaining mismatch is in chapter_06, outside this pass's allowed edit scope.

summary: Chapter 10 now lands the multi-tamperer realization without claiming every actor assignment as pre-proven, uses Paul's interview to newly confirm the body/wipe tampering on page, removes the repeated dock-path inventory, and drops the Mallick-POV 'She' opener spike well under the packet limit. The voicemail timestamp finding is only partially resolved here because chapter_10 already carries the canonical 8:47 PM time and the conflicting reference sits in another chapter.
